name: rippling-paystub-parser
description: Parse Rippling paystub PDFs and extract detailed payroll data

scripts.sankey: npm run parse && npm run build && npm run render
scripts.sankey:open: npm run parse && npm run build && npm run render:open
scripts.sankey:ytd: npm run parse:ytd && npm run build && npm run render
scripts.sankey:ytd:open: npm run parse:ytd && npm run build && npm run render:open
